SlimeWire features for Solana traders

A clear feature page helps users, directories, and search engines understand what SlimeWire actually does: scans, alerts, charts, wallets, PnL, proof, Telegram groups, and launches.

Open terminalHow it works

Key points

Live pairs

Fresh Solana memecoin discovery and scanner workflows.

Telegram bot

@SlimeWiredBot for scans, alerts, groups, calls, and terminal handoff.

Charts and txns

Dex chart and transaction review for selected tokens.

Wallet context

Balances, positions, PnL, presets, and trade review.

Proof pages

Receipts, calls, results, and shareable proof context.

Launch tools

Launch rooms, raid cards, alerts, scans, and community handoff.

FAQ

What are SlimeWire?s main features?

SlimeWire includes a Solana terminal, Telegram bot, token scans, alerts, charts, wallet context, positions, PnL, proof pages, and launch tools.

Is SlimeWire only for traders?

No. SlimeWire is also useful for Telegram groups, launch teams, callers, and communities that need cleaner token context.

Does SlimeWire guarantee results?

No. SlimeWire provides tools and context, not financial advice or guaranteed profit.
